mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate held near the zero lower bound compresses the equity discount rate and reduces the opportunity cost of holding risk assets, producing a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as long as FEDFUNDS stays below 0.5%.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or mean forward return during sub-0.5% FEDFUNDS periods is not statistically greater than the unconditional mean (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate of more than 0.3 percentage points over the trailing three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions that precede reduced consumer spending and corporate earnings downgrades, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the mean forward return conditional on trigger is not significantly below the unconditional mean (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) jointly indicate a broad-based contraction in consumer and residential demand that is not captured by either series alone, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS MoM < 0 AND HOUST MoM < 0 for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Joint-decline episodes fail to produce negative mean 60d forward returns significantly different from the unconditional mean (p > 0.05), or the joint signal underperforms the single-series RSAFS-only signal in out-of-sample Rank IC.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month momentum in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects expanding manufacturing output and corporate revenue growth, generating a short-horizon positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in improved near-term earnings visibility.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO MoM change and forward 5d returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) exceeding 200,000 in a single month signals an abrupt labor market shock that triggers risk-off equity positioning, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Triggered episodes show positive mean 20d forward returns or the effect is not statistically distinguishable from zero at p > 0.05 across the walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero and CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) is simultaneously subdued, the Fed's inability to further ease signals limited monetary policy space, causing markets to react more sharply and negatively to subsequent negative growth shocks, dampening S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days relative to periods with policy room.
regime_hint: zero interest rate policy regime with low inflation
failure_condition: Forward 60d returns during ZIRP-low-CPI regime are not significantly lower than returns during non-ZIRP regimes with equivalent growth shocks (p > 0.05), or Rank IC of the interaction term is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter contraction in real GDP (GDPC1) confirms an active recessionary demand shock, and given high revision risk, the confirmed contraction still predicts continued negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations reset downward.
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns following a negative GDPC1 print are positive in more than 55% of instances, or Rank IC is below 0.03 across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a regime where the federal funds rate is already at the zero lower bound, a simultaneous rise in unemployment (UNRATE) removes the possibility of offsetting monetary easing, amplifying negative equity market reaction over the next 5 trading days compared to unemployment increases occurring when policy rate cuts remain feasible.
failure_condition: The interaction signal's mean 5d forward return is not significantly more negative than the UNRATE-only signal's mean return (p > 0.05), or triggered instances show positive returns more than 50% of the time.
